‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
T

fuel scoop

Technology / Ship · First seen 3302-07-01 · 2 mentions
Active: 3302-07-01 → 3302-12-23
Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3307-04-12
Galactic Mysteries: Dredger Clans
Erik Gunnarson of Wallglass Investigations discusses the nomadic Dredger Clans — tribes living in converted bulk cruisers that roam deep space, scavenging and occasionally raiding. He mentions the Phagos clan's terrifying reputation and rumours of a rarely seen clan resurfacing.
3302-12-23
Freelance Report Allitnil Shatters Fuel Economy Records
Commander Allitnil has set a new record by travelling from Sol to Jaques Station in Colonia without stopping or equipping a fuel scoop, covering 5,489 hyperspace jumps in nine days aboard an Anaconda.
3302-07-01
Freelance Report The Jaques Rescue Mission
A coalition of independent pilots is coordinating a mission to deliver meta-alloys to Jaques Station in the Eol Prou RS-T d3-94 system to repair damage caused by Unknown Artefacts. Pilots are gathering in Maia, with many flying Asp Explorers fitted for long-range trade.
